_README: SUPERSEDED 2026-05-22 by the Playwright recon (see ../geo-recon-report.md). The LIVE keeply.work apex ALREADY emits a richer @graph (Organization + WebSite + SoftwareApplication + Person + HowTo + FAQPage, real price $599) via apps/website/_dev/inject-schema.js. Do NOT deploy this file. Remaining real gaps after recon: (1) Organization.founder — FIXED in inject-schema.js; (2) foundingDate — needs a real value; (3) Wikidata sameAs — deferred (brand name is crowded: keeply.com/getkeeply.io/keeply.se all hold it; notability-risky). Kept only as a shape reference.

@graph.description: Keeply is a file-version guardian for project teams: automatic version history, delivery tracking, and version protection for the files on your computer, NAS, or shared drive.

@graph.name: Keeply
@graph.description: Desktop app that keeps an always-on version history of your files and tags each delivery, so you can return to any past version — without learning developer tools.
@graph._offers_note: Keeply is solo-operated; fill real pricing tiers or drop the offers node entirely rather than guessing. Omit aggregateRating until you have real, verifiable reviews (fabricated ratings violate P0.4).
